SubLayerProcessing.SQLScript:
with CET_DATES as (
SELECT MAX(StatementToDate) as INCURREDDATE,  MAX(ClaimFinalizedDate) as PAID_THROUGH
FROM MedicalGoldenClaimDiagnosis
where YEAR(StatementToDate)= year(current_date()) 
),
CTE_RBHCCRAF as (
SELECT planMemberID
		,SUM(CASE WHEN isCoded = 'Y' THEN riskScore ELSE 0  END) AS CLOSED_RAF
		,SUM(CASE WHEN isCoded = 'N' AND isDroppedHCC = 0 THEN riskScore ELSE 0 END) AS OPEN_RAF 
FROM RiskByHCC 
WHERE year(snapshotdate) = year(current_date()) and month(snapshotdate) =  month(current_date())
group by planMemberID 
),

CTE_RBHCCSUS as (
SELECT PlanMemberID,SUM(cnt_OPEN_SUSPECT) AS OPEN_SUSPECT_COUNT
FROM
(
SELECT  
	PlanMemberID, cmsRiskModel 
	,COUNT(*) AS  cnt_OPEN_SUSPECT
FROM RiskByHCC
WHERE gapType IN ('SUSPECT', 'OPPORTUNITY')
AND isCoded = 'N' 
AND year(snapshotdate) = year(current_date()) and month(snapshotdate) =  month(current_date())
GROUP BY PlanMemberID, cmsRiskModel 
)X
GROUP BY PlanMemberID
),

cte_AWVClaims as (
select * from (
 SELECT A.PlanMemberID,	 
      CASE WHEN ProcCode IN ('G0438','G0439','G0468','99497','99498') THEN 1 ELSE NULL END AS AWV_CODE_FLAG,
      CASE WHEN ProcCode IN ('G0438','G0439','G0468','99497','99498') THEN c.PROVIDERID ELSE NULL END AS AWV_PROVIDERID,
      CASE WHEN ProcCode IN ('G0438','G0439','G0468','99497','99498') THEN A.StatementFromDate ELSE NULL  END AS AWV_DATE,
      CASE WHEN ProcCode IN ('G0438','G0439','G0468','99497','99498') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS AWV_DROP,
      CASE WHEN ProcCode IN ('G0438','G0439','G0468','99497','99498') THEN c.ProviderTIN ELSE NULL END AS AWV_TIN,
      ROW_NUMBER()OVER(PARTITION BY A.PlanMemberID ORDER BY A.CLAIMNUMBER DESC ) as RN
  FROM MedicalGoldenClaimdiagnosis A
  LEFT JOIN MedicalGoldenClaimLineProcCodes B
	  ON A.GeneratedMedicalClaimsUniqueKey=B.GeneratedMedicalClaimsUniqueKey
 LEFT JOIN  ChaseProviderList C 
      ON A.renderingProviderID=C.ProviderID    
  WHERE YEAR(A.StatementFromDate)=year(current_date()) and ProcCode IN ('G0438','G0439','G0468','99497','99498') -- AWV_DROP = 1
  ) a
  WHERE RN =1
)

select  distinct 
MBR.clientCode,
MBR.snapshotdate,
MBR.reportMonth,
MBR.serviceYear,
MBR.beneficiaryID,
MBR.planMemberID,
'' as MemberClientKey,
memberGender,
ROUND(DATEDIFF((select INCURREDDATE from CET_DATES Limit 1), MBR.memberDOB)/365)  as memberAGE,
'' as lowIncomeSubsidy,
enrollmentStartDate as memberEnrollmentStartDate,
enrollmentEndDate as memberEnrollmentEndDate,
poolID as poCode,
'ADV' as lobid,
p.planID,
p.PlanDescription,
MBR.PermanentZipCode as memberZIPCode,
MBR.permanentCity as memberState,
MBR.permanentCounty as memberCounty,
providerID as attributedProviderID,
providerTIN as attributedProviderTIN,
memberDOB,
CASE WHEN SG.HOSPICE='Y' AND DS.DEMORISKSCORE!=0 THEN 0 ELSE COALESCE(DS.DEMORISKSCORE,0.0) END AS memberDemographicRiskScore,  -- raf
COALESCE(CLOSED_RAF,0.0) AS memberCodedRiskScore, -- raf
COALESCE(OPEN_RAF,0.0) AS opportunityRiskScore,-- raf
ROUND(DATEDIFF(enrollmentEndDate,enrollmentStartDate)/365) as memberMonths,
to_date((select INCURREDDATE from CET_DATES Limit 1))  AS incurredEndDate,
to_date((select PAID_THROUGH from CET_DATES Limit 1)) AS paidThroughDate,
SG.HOSPICE as hospiceind,
SG.ESRD as esrdInd,
'' as inHomeAssessmentInd,
'' as inHomeAssessmentDOS,
'' as specialistonlyInd,
'' as selfManagingInd,
CASE WHEN sus.OPEN_SUSPECT_COUNT>=2 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END as polyChronicInd,
AWV_DATE as annualWellnessVisitDate,
AWV_PROVIDERID as annualWellnessVisitProviderID,
AWV_TIN as annualWellnessVisitProviderTIN,
SG.MemberStatus as memberModelStatus
FROM Membership MBR
LEFT JOIN cte_AWVClaims AWV
ON MBR.PlanMemberID=AWV.PlanMemberID 
LEFT JOIN (select planMemberID, bround(SUM(FACRATE),2) AS DEMORISKSCORE from DemographicRiskScore group by planMemberID) DS 
ON MBR.PlanMemberID = DS.PlanMemberID
LEFT JOIN CTE_RBHCCRAF RAF
ON  MBR.planMemberID = RAF.planMemberID
LEFT JOIN CTE_RBHCCSUS sus
ON MBR.planMemberID = sus.planMemberID 
LEFT JOIN PlanXref  p 
ON MBR.PlanID=p.planid
LEFT JOIN Segment SG 
ON MBR.PlanMemberID=SG.PlanMemberID And MBR.EnrollmentStartdate=SG.startdate and MBR.enrollmentEndDate=SG.Enddate													
where year(MBR.snapshotdate) = year(current_date()) and month(snapshotdate) =  month(current_date())
SubLayerProcessing.MergeScript:
with source_cte as (
select ss.*,
case when dt.snapshotdate is null then 'insert' else 'exist' end as Source
FROM tempSQLScript ss 
LEFT JOIN DestinationTable dt 
on ss.snapshotdate = dt.snapshotdate
)

MERGE INTO DestinationTable t USING source_cte as  s 
ON s.snapshotdate = t.snapshotdate
WHEN NOT MATCHED AND s.Source ='insert' 
THEN INSERT (
clientCode
,snapshotdate
,reportMonth
,serviceYear 
,beneficiaryID
,planMemberID
,memberClientKey
,memberGender
,memberAGE
,lowIncomeSubsidy
,memberEnrollmentStartDate
,memberEnrollmentEndDate
,poCode
,lobid 
,planID
,PlanDescription 
,memberZIPCode
,memberState
,memberCounty
,attributedProviderID
,attributedProviderTIN
,memberDOB
,memberDemographicRiskScore
,memberCodedRiskScore
,opportunityRiskScore
,memberMonths
,incurredEndDate
,paidThroughDate
,hospiceind
,esrdInd
,inHomeAssessmentInd
,inHomeAssessmentDOS
,specialistonlyInd
,selfManagingInd
,polyChronicInd
,annualWellnessVisitDate
,annualWellnessVisitProviderID
,annualWellnessVisitProviderTIN
,memberModelStatus
)
VALUES (s.clientCode
,s.snapshotdate
,s.reportMonth
,s.serviceYear 
,s.beneficiaryID
,s.planMemberID
,s.memberClientKey
,s.memberGender
,s.memberAGE
,s.lowIncomeSubsidy
,s.memberEnrollmentStartDate
,s.memberEnrollmentEndDate
,s.poCode
,s.lobid 
,s.planID
,s.PlanDescription 
,s.memberZIPCode
,s.memberState
,s.memberCounty
,s.attributedProviderID
,s.attributedProviderTIN
,s.memberDOB
,s.memberDemographicRiskScore
,s.memberCodedRiskScore
,s.opportunityRiskScore
,s.memberMonths
,s.incurredEndDate
,s.paidThroughDate
,s.hospiceind
,s.esrdInd
,s.inHomeAssessmentInd
,s.inHomeAssessmentDOS
,s.specialistonlyInd
,s.selfManagingInd
,s.polyChronicInd
,s.annualWellnessVisitDate
,s.annualWellnessVisitProviderID
,s.annualWellnessVisitProviderTIN
,s.memberModelStatus)
